text.title: Project Integration Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are scope/schedule/cost changes from a CR?

conclusion.verdict: compute cross-area impact memo; if accepted, re-baseline + ADR entry
do NOT re-baseline; track variance against original; escalate if threshold breached
run integration-status.py; render report from JSON; PM annotates, does not override colour
